text: This is a sixty-six-year-old patient who presented with a new diagnosis of a colon cancer in the left colon.

We biopsied this intraoperatively and it was consistent with cancer and postoperatively he underwent aggressive adjuvant chemotherapy with an excellent response in the liver tumor.
